# 757 Tech Consultant & Hampton Roads Web Developer | Neal Frazier Bliki

> Expert IT systems, local SEO, and composable web development for Virginia Beach, Norfolk, Chesapeake, and the greater Hampton Roads 757 region. I build lightning-fast, high-converting booking funnels and AI-powered workflows.
> Author: Neal Frazier
> Location: Virginia Beach, VA
> Base URL: https://www.nealfrazier.tech

## Pages

## Services
- Netlify Composable Systems & 757 Web Development (Starting at $499): A production-ready build system for Hampton Roads business teams moving from AI prototypes to high-performance Netlify web platforms without Next.js overhead.
- Virginia Beach & Norfolk Local SEO Web Design ($100 Build Fee (+ domain/email costs)): For new businesses in the 757 area code that need to get online immediately with a clean, conversion-focused, SEO-optimized landing page.
- Hampton Roads AI Systems & IT Consulting (Starting at $349): I turn your workstation into a tailored AI command center, building custom automations for local operators in Norfolk, Chesapeake, and Virginia Beach.
- Enterprise Netlify & Cloud Migration Advisory (757) (Advisory + implementation scope): For Hampton Roads companies migrating legacy systems to Netlify composable architecture with phased rollouts and controlled compliance.

## Wiki Nodes
- [Netlify Partner Program Journey](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/wiki/wiki_netlify_partner): Manifesto and operating model for moving teams in Hampton Roads from AI experimentation to enterprise-grade production on Netlify without Next.js bloat.
- [100 Websites in 30 Days](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/wiki/wiki_100_websites): A high-velocity frontend development challenge hosted at https://100websitesin30days.netlify.app/. Serves as the ultimate proof-of-work for prospective clients.
- [Virginia Beach & Hampton Roads Local SEO Matrix](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/wiki/wiki_vb_local_seo): A living playbook of search ranking factors for Norfolk, Virginia Beach, and Chesapeake. Focuses on local entity schema, Google Business Profile signals, and high-speed Netlify edge performance.
- [757 Booking Funnel Architecture](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/wiki/wiki_vb_booking_stack): The IT systems architecture I use to convert Hampton Roads visitors into booked appointments: mobile-first CTA patterns, serverless lead capture, and API syncs.
- [7-Day Web Launch Sprint for Hampton Roads Brands](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/wiki/wiki_launch_sprint): A repeatable 7-day launch sprint for brand-new businesses in Norfolk, Chesapeake, and Virginia Beach. Covers positioning, local keywords, technical SEO, and calendar integration.
- [Conversion Copy Blocks for Local Service Sites](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/wiki/wiki_conversion_copy): A library of reusable copy structures for hero sections, trust banners, service cards, and FAQ answers. Designed to reduce bounce and increase booking intent without bloating the page.
- [757 AI Systems & Laptop Workstations](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/wiki/wiki_ai_powerhouse_setup): Tailored local AI setups for Hampton Roads business operators. Enforces local model privacy, custom prompt libraries, and automated task execution.
- [Hampton Roads $100 One-Page Launch Framework](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/wiki/wiki_one_page_rapid_offer): A streamlined, high-speed launch option for new local services in the 757: custom landing page, SEO setup, and clean ownership handoff.

## Blog Posts

- [Solving the 'Get Booked' Problem for 757 Service Businesses](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/blog/post_005): How I optimize lead conversion for Hampton Roads and Virginia Beach specialty services by eliminating booking friction, integrating serverless APIs, and structuring pages around user intent.
- [My Journey to Becoming a Certified Netlify Partner](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/blog/post_006): The practical reason behind my Netlify Partner path: solve inconsistent delivery quality with measurable deployment standards, not freelancer heroics.
- [From Click to Confirmed Booking in Under 90 Seconds](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/blog/post_007): A booking funnel benchmark for local services: if first-time visitors cannot go from click to confirmation in 90 seconds, the funnel needs redesign.
- [The 7-Day Website Launch Sprint I Use for Norfolk & VB Brands](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/blog/post_008): A breakdown of the structured 7-day build sequence that gets Hampton Roads businesses online fast with full local SEO, analytics, and booking systems in place.
- [Copy That Converts: Reusing Blocks Without Sounding Generic](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/blog/post_009): How I reuse high-performing copy frameworks without making businesses sound the same: same structure, different voice, proof, and local context.
- [I Turned a Regular Laptop Into a Practical AI Command Center](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/blog/post_010): My practical AI workstation model for operators: turn scattered subscriptions into a weekly execution system with clear task lanes and governance boundaries.
- [The $100 One-Page Site That Gets Hampton Roads Businesses Moving Fast](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/blog/post_011): Why a single conversion-focused landing page is the fastest way for new businesses in Norfolk, Virginia Beach, and Chesapeake to start ranking locally.
- [Manifesto: From AI Shipper to Netlify Partner Architect](https://www.nealfrazier.tech/blog/post_012): My operating manifesto: combine AI prototyping speed with partner-grade Netlify architecture so products can move from idea to reliable production without platform bloat.

## FAQ
Q: How long does it take to build my website?
A: Most 757 specialty launchpad sites are live in 1-2 weeks. Having shipped 100+ sites (including the 100 Websites in 30 Days challenge) for businesses in Virginia Beach, Norfolk, and Chesapeake, I use a proven component library to deliver fast, production-ready systems without cutting corners.

Q: Do I need to provide content and images?
A: I will guide you through exactly what's needed. I specialize in copy positioning and conversion design for Hampton Roads service businesses, so I handle the copywriting, layouts, and keyword targeting. If you have photos of your local work, we will optimize them for fast loading.

Q: Will my site actually rank on Google?
A: Yes. Every site I ship in the 757 includes built-in local SEO: structured JSON-LD schema (FAQ, Service, and LocalBusiness markup), Google Business Profile optimization, and high-performance Netlify edge-delivery. These technical details are essential for ranking in competitive Hampton Roads keywords.

Q: What about booking and scheduling?
A: Integrated booking is standard. I use serverless Netlify Functions to connect your site with tools like Calendly or custom databases, so local customers in Norfolk or Virginia Beach can book instantly with zero phone tag or scheduling friction.

Q: What if I need changes after launch?
A: Your site is built using modular React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS. As a freelance tech consultant in Hampton Roads, I provide ongoing support, systems maintenance, and fast feature updates. You are never locked into a proprietary agency template.


## AI Agent Quick Reference
This site is designed for AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) and AI agent accessibility.
Every page has JSON-LD structured data. Blog posts use Article schema; wiki nodes use TechArticle.
All content is prerendered as static HTML — no client-side rendering required to read any page.
To answer questions about this site, fetch llms-full.txt or the specific page URLs above.
